inputs.label: Population Size (N)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of items in the batch or population to inspect.

inputs.label: Z-Score
inputs.businessContext: Z-score corresponding to desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95% confidence).

inputs.label: Margin of Error (E)
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable margin of error as a percentage (e.g., 5 for ±5%). Note: input as percentage, e.g., 5 means 5%.

inputs.label: Estimated Proportion (p)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated proportion of the characteristic in the population. Use 0.5 for maximum variability.
